name: Need to Know Episode #5 published
summary: Bryce Zabel and Ross Coulthart trace the emergence of modern UFO history from World War II foo fighter reports and the 1946 Scandinavian ghost rockets through the flying-saucer wave of 1947 and the Roswell incident.
